Name: AntiqueStandParam
Description: Defines the parameters for relic vessels.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon to display for this relic vessel in the menu.

Fields.Name: Hero Type
Fields.Description: Which heros can use this relic vessel.

Fields.Name: Relic Slot Color: 1
Fields.Description: The color for the first relic slot.

Fields.Name: Relic Slot Color: 2
Fields.Description: The color for the second relic slot.

Fields.Name: Relic Slot Color: 3
Fields.Description: The color for the third relic slot.

Fields.Name: Unlock Flag
Fields.Description: The unlock flag for this relic vessel.

Fields.Name: Linked Goods ID
Fields.Description: The linked goods item for this relic vessel.

Fields.Name: Depths Relic Slot Color: 1
Fields.Description: The color for the first depths relic slot.

Fields.Name: Depths Relic Slot Color: 2
Fields.Description: The color for the second depths relic slot.

Fields.Name: Depths Relic Slot Color: 3
Fields.Description: The color for the third depths relic slot.
